creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Steffen

we normalize issue summaries because [tags] are a relic of gnats and beyond making summaries longer and more difficult to read, are an unstructured/imprecise method for determining the classification and/or state of an issue (and more importantly, the changes/patches/attachments within the issue)

maintainer-approval on the other hand is a flag associated with a patch (Attachment) rather than the overall issue itself and is used as the basis for the " Ports: Maintainer Approved " saved search that you should be able to see in the Bugzilla footer. This is the canonical list of "maintainer approved" issues that developers should and do use to determine what they can work on.
